footer.tagline: Connecting Canadian homebuyers with trusted mortgage brokers, anonymously and securely.
footer.disclaimer: MortgageMatch is a connection platform. We do not provide mortgage advice or lending services.

home.subtitle: MortgageMatch is the privacy-first marketplace where you describe your mortgage needs without revealing your identity. Verified brokers compete for your business, and you choose who to connect with — on your terms.
home.threeSteps: Three Simple Steps to Your Ideal Broker
home.step1Desc: Describe your mortgage needs anonymously. Share your loan amount, property type, timeline, and preferences without revealing personal details.
home.step2Desc: Verified brokers review your request and express interest. Compare their profiles, reviews, specializations, and proposed approaches side by side.
home.step3Desc: When you find the right broker, choose to share your contact information. Your identity stays private until you decide to reveal it.
home.trustDesc: Your confidence is our foundation. Every aspect of MortgageMatch is designed to protect your privacy and ensure quality.
home.privacyFirstDesc: Your personal information is never shared without your explicit consent. Browse and compare brokers completely anonymously.
home.verifiedBrokersDesc: Every broker on MortgageMatch is licensed, vetted, and verified. We check credentials and monitor reviews so you can browse with confidence.
home.noCommitmentDesc: Explore your options freely. There is no obligation to connect with any broker and no fees for borrowers — ever.
home.readyDesc: Submit your anonymous request in minutes and let brokers come to you.
home.disclaimerFull: MortgageMatch is a marketplace platform that connects borrowers with licensed mortgage brokers. We do not provide mortgage advice, make lending decisions, or act as a lender. All mortgage products and services are offered by independent, licensed brokers. Please consult with a qualified professional before making any financial decisions.

manual.title: Admin Manual
manual.subtitle: Complete guide to managing the MortgageMatch platform.
manual.overviewP1: The admin portal gives you full control over the MortgageMatch platform. From here you can manage users, verify brokers, oversee requests and conversations, handle reports, and review a complete audit trail of all administrative actions.
manual.overviewP2: All admin pages use client-side filtering — data is loaded once when the page opens, and search/filter changes are instant without reloading. Every action you take (status changes, credit adjustments, verifications, deletions) is automatically logged to the activity log.
manual.overviewTip: Tip: All admin pages are accessible from the dashboard quick links. You can also navigate directly via the URL bar (e.g., /admin/users, /admin/requests).
manual.dashboardP1: The dashboard (/admin/dashboard) is your landing page. It shows six live statistics:
manual.dashboardStat1: Total Users — all registered accounts on the platform
manual.dashboardStat2: Pending Verifications — brokers waiting for license verification
manual.dashboardStat3: Active Requests — borrower requests currently open or in progress
manual.dashboardStat4: Open Reports — user-submitted reports that need attention
manual.dashboardStat6: Total Requests — all borrower requests ever created
manual.dashboardP2: Below the stats, quick link cards take you directly to each admin tool. Each card shows a live count so you can prioritize where to look first.
manual.userManagementP1: The user management page (/admin/users) shows every account on the platform — borrowers, brokers, and other admins.
manual.userSearch1: Search by name, email, or 9-digit public user ID
manual.userSearch2: Filter by role: All, Borrowers, Brokers, Admins
manual.userSearch3: Results update instantly as you type — no need to press Enter
manual.userCol2: User ID — the 9-digit public ID (click to copy to clipboard)
manual.userCol3: Role — BORROWER, BROKER, or ADMIN badge
manual.userCol4: Status — ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, or BANNED badge
manual.userCol5: Details — for brokers: brokerage name, subscription tier, and credit count. For borrowers: request and conversation counts
manual.userCol7: Actions — available actions based on the user's current state
manual.accountActionsP1: You can change a user's account status. These actions are available for non-admin users only (you cannot suspend or ban other admins):
manual.accountAction1: Suspend — temporarily restricts login. The user sees a 'suspended' message when trying to sign in. Use for warnings or investigations.
manual.accountAction2: Ban — permanently blocks the account. The user sees a 'banned' message. Use for confirmed policy violations.
manual.accountAction3: Reactivate — restores a suspended or banned account back to active status.
manual.accountActionsWarning: Warning: Suspending or banning a user takes effect immediately. They will be blocked on their next login attempt.
manual.creditAdjP1: For broker accounts, a 'Credits' button opens a modal where you can add or remove response credits:
manual.creditAdj1: Enter a positive number to add credits (e.g., 5)
manual.creditAdj2: Enter a negative number to remove credits (e.g., -3)
manual.creditAdj3: Always provide a reason (e.g., 'Refund for spam request', 'Promotional bonus')
manual.creditAdj4: The new balance is shown immediately after confirmation
manual.creditAdjTip: Tip: Credit adjustments are logged in the activity log with the amount, previous balance, new balance, and your reason.
manual.brokerManagementP1: The broker management page (/admin/brokers) lists all broker profiles with their key information at a glance.
manual.brokerCol3: Province — where the broker is licensed
manual.brokerCol5: Status — verification status: PENDING, VERIFIED, or REJECTED
manual.brokerCol6: Tier — subscription tier: FREE, BASIC, PRO, or PREMIUM
manual.brokerCol7: Rating — average borrower rating (or -- if no reviews)
manual.brokerCol8: Actions — View (opens detail page), Verify, or Suspend buttons
manual.brokerAction1: View — opens the full broker detail page
manual.brokerAction2: Verify — instantly approves a pending broker (one click)
manual.brokerAction3: Suspend — rejects a broker's verification (they can no longer view requests or send introductions)
manual.brokerFilterP1: Use the status filter dropdown to narrow the list to only PENDING, VERIFIED, or REJECTED brokers.
manual.brokerDetailP1: Clicking 'View' on any broker (from the broker list or user management page) opens a comprehensive detail page (/admin/brokers/[id]).
manual.brokerSection1: Header — broker name, public user ID, verification badge, subscription tier badge, account status badge
manual.brokerSection2: Profile Info — brokerage, email, license number, province, mortgage category, experience, areas served, specialties, member since, bio
manual.brokerSection3: Stats Cards — credits remaining, total introductions, total conversations, average rating with review count
manual.brokerSection4: Verification Actions — Approve, Reject, or Reset to Pending buttons (changes take effect immediately)
manual.brokerSection5: Recent Introductions — last 20 introductions with request type, location, status, and date. Click 'View' to go to request management.
manual.brokerSection6: Recent Conversations — last 20 conversations with borrower name, status, message count, and last activity. Click 'Messages' to view the thread.
manual.brokerSection7: Reviews — all reviews with star ratings, borrower names, dates, and comments
manual.brokerSection8: Credit Purchases — purchase history showing pack type, credit count, amount paid, and date
manual.verificationP1: The verification queue (/admin/verification) shows brokers awaiting license verification. This is a focused view — it only shows PENDING brokers.
manual.verificationP2: For each broker you can approve or reject. Approved brokers can immediately start viewing requests and sending introductions (depending on their subscription tier). Rejected brokers are blocked from these features.
manual.verificationTip: Tip: You can also verify brokers from the broker management list or from the broker detail page. All three methods are equivalent.
manual.requestManagementP1: The request management page (/admin/requests) gives you oversight of all borrower mortgage requests on the platform.
manual.requestSearch1: Search by request ID, borrower name, province, or city
manual.requestSearch2: Filter by status: Open, In Progress, Closed, Expired
manual.requestSearch3: Filter by type: Purchase, Refinance, Renewal
manual.requestAction1: Details — opens a modal showing the full request information: borrower, property type, price range, mortgage amount, employment type, credit score band, closing timeline, and notes
manual.requestAction2: Status — opens a modal to change the request status. You must select a new status and can optionally provide a reason. When closing a request, all active conversations are automatically closed too.
manual.requestAction3: Delete — permanently removes the request and ALL related data: introductions, conversations, messages, and reviews. This cannot be undone.
manual.requestDeleteWarning: Warning: Deleting a request is irreversible. All associated introductions, conversations, messages, and reviews will be permanently removed. Always provide a reason for the audit trail.
manual.conversationsP1: The conversation oversight page (/admin/conversations) lets you monitor all borrower-broker messaging on the platform.
manual.convoList1: Search by participant name, email, or brokerage name
manual.convoList2: Filter by status: Active or Closed
manual.convoList3: Each row shows: participants (with account status badges if suspended/banned), related request info, message count, last message preview, and review rating if exists
manual.convoDetailP1: Click 'Messages' to open the full conversation thread (/admin/conversations/[id]). Here you can see:
manual.convoDetail1: Every message with sender name, role badge (Borrower/Broker/Admin), and timestamp
manual.convoDetail2: Admin closure messages are highlighted with an amber border
manual.convoDetail3: Conversation info card showing borrower, broker, request details, and status
manual.convoDetail4: If a review was left, it shows the star rating and comment
manual.closingConvoP1: You can close any active conversation by clicking the 'Close' button. You must provide a reason (e.g., 'Abusive language', 'Spam'). When you close a conversation:
manual.closingConvo1: An admin message is automatically sent to the conversation with the closure reason
manual.closingConvo2: The conversation status changes to CLOSED
manual.closingConvo3: Both the borrower and broker can no longer send messages
manual.closingConvo4: The action is logged in the activity log
manual.reportsP1: The reports page (/admin/reports) shows all user-submitted reports. Users can report brokers, requests, or conversations for policy violations.
manual.reportSearch1: Search by reporter name, reason text, or target ID
manual.reportSearch2: Filter by status: Open, Reviewed, Resolved, Dismissed
manual.reportSearch3: Filter by target type: Broker, Request, Conversation
manual.reportWorkflowP1: Each report has a status lifecycle:
manual.reportStatus2: REVIEWED — you've looked at it but haven't made a decision yet
manual.reportStatus3: RESOLVED — action was taken (e.g., broker suspended, content removed)
manual.reportStatus4: DISMISSED — investigated but no action needed (false report, duplicate, etc.)
manual.reportAction1: View Target — click the target badge (Broker/Request/Conversation) to navigate to the relevant admin page for investigation
manual.reportAction2: Add/Edit Notes — open the notes modal to record your investigation findings, resolution details, or follow-up actions. You can also change the report status from this modal.
manual.reportAction3: Resolve — marks the report as resolved and records the resolution timestamp
manual.reportAction4: Dismiss — marks the report as dismissed (no action taken)
manual.reportAction5: Reopen — changes a resolved or dismissed report back to OPEN status for re-investigation
manual.reportTip: Tip: Always add notes before resolving or dismissing a report. Notes help other admins understand what was investigated and why the decision was made.
manual.activityLogP1: The activity log (/admin/activity) is a complete audit trail of every admin action taken on the platform. Every status change, credit adjustment, verification, deletion, and conversation closure is recorded here.
manual.action1: CREDIT_ADJUST — broker credit adjustments with amount and reason
manual.activityDetailsP1: Each log entry shows: the admin who performed the action, the action type, the target (user, broker, request, etc.), a timestamp, and detailed information specific to the action type (e.g., previous/new balance for credit adjustments, previous/new status for status changes).
manual.activityFilterP1: Use the filter dropdown to narrow the log to specific action types. This is useful for auditing specific categories of actions (e.g., all credit adjustments, all bans).
manual.publicIdsP1: Every user on the platform has a unique 9-digit public ID (e.g., 482913756). This ID is shown to users on their profile page and to admins in the user management table.
manual.publicId1: Users see their ID on their profile/settings page with a note to use it when contacting support
manual.publicId2: Admins can search by public ID in the user management page
manual.publicId3: The public ID is displayed on the broker detail page for quick reference
manual.publicId4: Click any public ID in the admin table to copy it to your clipboard
manual.publicIdsP2: Internal database IDs (CUIDs) are never shown to users. When a user contacts support, ask for their 9-digit user ID to quickly locate their account.
manual.auditTrailP1: Every admin action is automatically logged. You don't need to do anything — the system records who did what, when, and why.
manual.bestPractice1: Always provide a reason when suspending, banning, or adjusting credits — the reason is saved in the audit trail
manual.bestPractice2: Add notes to reports before resolving or dismissing — this helps other admins understand your decision
manual.bestPractice3: Use 'Suspend' as a first step for investigations, 'Ban' only for confirmed violations
manual.bestPractice4: Check the activity log regularly to stay aware of actions taken by other admins
manual.bestPractice5: When closing a conversation, provide a clear reason — it's sent as a message visible to both parties
manual.bestPractice6: Before deleting a request, verify it's truly spam/fraud — deletion is permanent and removes all associated data
manual.bestPractice7: Verify broker licenses carefully — approved brokers immediately gain access to borrower requests

howItWorks.title: How MortgageMatch Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A transparent, privacy-first process that puts borrowers in control and helps brokers find qualified clients.
howItWorks.borrowerTitle: Your Journey to the Right Broker
howItWorks.readyDesc: Submit your anonymous request in minutes — it is completely free for borrowers.
howItWorks.bStep1Desc: Tell us about your mortgage needs — property type, budget, timeline, and preferences. No personal information required. Your request goes live within minutes.
howItWorks.bStep2Desc: Licensed, verified brokers in your area review your request. Interested brokers send you their introduction, including their experience, approach, and how they can help.
howItWorks.bStep3Desc: Review broker profiles, ratings, and introductions side by side. Take your time — there is no pressure or commitment at any stage.
howItWorks.bStep4Desc: When you find the right broker, choose to share your contact information. Start your mortgage journey with a broker you have already vetted.
howItWorks.brStep1Desc: Set up your professional profile showcasing your experience, specialties, areas served, and client reviews. A strong profile helps you stand out.
howItWorks.brStep2Desc: View anonymous mortgage requests from borrowers in your area. Filter by property type, budget range, timeline, and more to find ideal matches.
howItWorks.brStep3Desc: Express interest by sending a personalized introduction. Explain your experience, approach, and how you can help with their specific situation.
howItWorks.brStep4Desc: When a borrower selects you, they share their contact information. Begin your professional relationship with a warm, qualified lead.
howItWorks.faq1Q: Is MortgageMatch really free for borrowers?
howItWorks.faq1A: Yes, completely free. Borrowers never pay anything to use MortgageMatch. Our platform is funded by broker subscriptions.
howItWorks.faq2A: Your personal information is never shared until you explicitly choose to connect with a broker. All requests are fully anonymous — brokers only see your mortgage requirements.
howItWorks.faq3Q: What if I don't like any of the brokers?
howItWorks.faq3A: No problem at all. There is zero obligation to connect with any broker. You can close your request at any time with no consequences.
howItWorks.faq4A: Every broker on MortgageMatch must hold a valid mortgage broker license. We verify credentials, check references, and monitor ongoing performance and reviews.
howItWorks.faq5Q: Can I receive multiple broker responses?
howItWorks.faq5A: Absolutely. In fact, that is the core value of MortgageMatch. Multiple qualified brokers can express interest in your request, giving you the power to compare and choose the best fit.
howItWorks.faq6Q: What if I change my mind?
howItWorks.faq6A: You can withdraw your request or decline any broker at any time. There is no commitment or obligation at any stage of the process.
howItWorks.bStep5Desc: When you find a broker you like, choose to share your contact information. This is the only point at which your identity is revealed — and only to the broker you select.
howItWorks.bStep6Desc: Move forward with confidence. After connecting, your broker guides you through the mortgage process. Leave a review to help future borrowers.
howItWorks.brStep5Desc: If the borrower chooses you, contact information is exchanged and you can begin the consultation process directly.

forBrokers.subtitle: Connect with borrowers who are actively looking for a broker. No cold outreach, no expensive ads — just qualified leads delivered to your dashboard.
forBrokers.advantageSubtitle: A smarter way to build your client base
forBrokers.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
forBrokers.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of brokers already using MortgageMatch to find qualified clients efficiently.
forBrokers.benefit1Desc: Every request comes from a borrower actively seeking a mortgage broker. No tire-kickers, no cold leads — just real opportunities.
forBrokers.benefit2Desc: Stop spending time and money on ads and cold calls. Borrowers come to you, and you choose which opportunities to pursue.
forBrokers.benefit3Desc: Earn reviews and build a profile that showcases your expertise. Great service leads to more visibility and more connections.
forBrokers.benefit4Desc: No long-term contracts, no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your business and scale as you grow.
forBrokers.benefit5Desc: Borrowers trust our platform because their data is protected. That trust means higher quality leads and better conversion rates.
forBrokers.benefit6Desc: Manage requests, track introductions, and communicate with borrowers — all from one intuitive, professional dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Choose the plan that matches your business goals and scale as you grow.
pricing.freeDesc: Get verified and browse requests. No introductions included.
pricing.basicDesc: For individual brokers getting started on the platform.
pricing.proDesc: For established brokers looking to scale their pipeline.
pricing.premiumDesc: For top performers and brokerage teams.
pricing.compareSubtitle: A detailed look at what each plan includes
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan. No credit card required.
pricing.faq1Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq2Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
pricing.faq2A: No, all plans are month-to-month. You can cancel at any time with no penalties or hidden fees.
pricing.faq3A: A response is when you send an introduction to a borrower's request. You only use a response credit when you actively reach out.
pricing.faq4Q: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
pricing.faq4A: Yes, annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly billing. Contact us for details.
pricing.faq5Q: What happens if I exceed my monthly introductions?
pricing.faq5A: You can purchase additional introductions at a per-response rate, or upgrade your plan for more capacity.
pricing.faq6Q: Can I try before I commit?
pricing.faq6A: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan so you can experience the full platform before committing.

privacy.title: How Your Data Is Protected
privacy.subtitle: Four pillars of our privacy commitment
privacy.transparencySubtitle: Complete transparency about the information we gather and why
privacy.controlSubtitle: The answer is simple: only when you decide.
privacy.step1Desc: Your identity is completely hidden. Brokers only see your mortgage requirements.
privacy.step2Desc: Your identity is still hidden. Compare brokers without any pressure.
privacy.step3Desc: Only now is your contact information shared — and only with the broker you selected.
privacy.verificationSubtitle: Every broker on MortgageMatch goes through a rigorous verification process
privacy.reportDesc: If you ever have a concern about a broker on our platform, contact us at support@mortgagematch.ca. We investigate all reports and take appropriate action.
privacy.ctaDesc: Ready to explore your mortgage options without compromising your privacy?
privacy.protection1Desc: Your personal information is never shared with brokers unless you explicitly choose to connect. Browse, compare, and evaluate completely anonymously.
privacy.protection2Desc: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Your information is as secure as your online banking.
privacy.protection3Desc: Download or delete your data at any time. We never sell your information to third parties. Period.
privacy.protection4Desc: Every broker is licensed and verified. We continuously monitor for compliance and investigate any reported concerns.
privacy.data1Purpose: To create and secure your account
privacy.data2Purpose: To match you with relevant brokers
privacy.verify4: Regular review of client feedback and ratings
privacy.heroDesc: Privacy is not just a feature at MortgageMatch — it is the foundation of everything we build. Here is exactly how we protect you.
privacy.metaDesc: Learn how MortgageMatch protects your privacy, what data we collect, and how our broker verification process works.
privacy.data2Item2: Password (hashed, never stored in plain text)
privacy.verify1Desc: We verify every broker's NMLS license number and confirm it is active and in good standing with state regulators.
privacy.verify2Desc: Brokers must verify their identity through a secure process that matches their professional credentials.
privacy.verify3Desc: We review each broker's professional history, checking for disciplinary actions, complaints, and regulatory issues.
privacy.verify4Desc: Verification is not a one-time event. We continuously monitor license status, review borrower feedback, and investigate complaints to maintain marketplace quality.

review.subtitle: How was your experience with this broker?
review.noReviewsDesc: Reviews from borrowers will appear here after conversations are closed.
